items.name: WrenAI
items.description: Give AI agents the context to query business data correctly through the open context layer that gives AI agents grounded, governed memory, context, SQL across 20+ data sources, that helps you build agentic GenBI, text-to-sql, dashboards, and agentic analytics.

items.name: openai-agents-python
items.description: A lightweight, powerful framework for multi-agent workflows

items.name: mateclaw
items.description: 🤖 MateClaw — Your second brain with Multi-Agent Orchestration, MCP Protocol, Skills & Memory, Dream, and Multi-Channel Support. Built on Spring AI Alibaba.

items.name: tinybot
items.description: Tinybot is a lightweight personal AI Agent that is constantly evolving

items.name: OfficeCLI
items.description: OfficeCLI is the first and best Office suite  purpose-built for AI agents to read, edit, and automate Word, Excel, and PowerPoint files. Free, open-source, single binary, no Office installation required.

items.name: mcp-gateway-registry
items.description: Enterprise-ready MCP Gateway & Registry that centralizes AI development tools with secure OAuth authentication, dynamic tool discovery, and unified access for both autonomous AI agents and AI coding assistants. Transform scattered MCP server chaos into governed, auditable tool access with Keycloak/Entra integration.

items.name: CowAgent
items.description: Open-source super AI assistant & Agent Harness. Plans tasks, runs tools and skills, autonomously grows with memory and knowledge. Multi-model, multi-channel. Lightweight, extensible, one-line install. (formerly chatgpt-on-wechat)

items.name: agentgateway
items.description: Next Generation Agentic Proxy for AI Agents and MCP servers

items.name: oh-my-claudecode
items.description: Teams-first Multi-agent orchestration for Claude Code

items.name: 1Panel
items.description: 🔥 1Panel is a modern, open-source VPS control panel — and the only one with native AI agent support. Run Ollama models, deploy OpenClaw agents, and manage your entire server stack from one clean web interface.
